race.comment: CAFFETTIERA (8) gets the nod. She's racing well this time in, off a five week freshen into this. She worked home well for a narrow fourth at Geelong when last seen in this grade and looks to have found an ideal race having shown stakes ability earlier in her career. KID DYNAMITE (4) has come back well, backing up a solid BM56 win fresh when just finding one better this level last start. He'll get back and be working home late. MEISHO (12) ran well fresh at Cranbourne and can improve but Meech will have her work cut out to get across from the gate. GUNADO (3) was trending the right way last campaign and handled a heavy deck two starts ago. Drawn the inside on resumption and can fire a shot first-up.
